OSError: [Errno 28] No space left on device:

sglang.title: [MoE] Extend kimi_k2_moe_fused_gate to support 256 experts (MiMo V2 Flash)
sglang.author: mpdfdfl
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
kimi_k2_moe_fused_gate is currently hard-coded for 384-expert routing (Kimi K2). MiMo V2 Flash uses the same DeepSeek-style noaux_tc routing with num_expert_group=1 but has 256 experts. This PR extends the fast-path kernel to cover both 256 and 384 expert configurations from a single code

sglang.title: Make unified tree SWA hicache tests faithful to write-through backup
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The SWA HiCache unit tests backed up a single node (with auto-backup disabled) and asserted on a single-leaf tree shape, so they neither exercised the real parent-first write-through backup nor tolerated a sequence spanning multiple tree nodes. This backs up the full path and asserts topo

sglang.title: [AMD] make bypass-fastfail label also disable within-suite fast-fail
sglang.author: yctseng0211
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
ref #26566

Motivation
On AMD CI today, two layers of fast-fail kick in on a PR:

Cross-stage — if any stage-B job fails, wait-for-stage-b-amd polls and core.setFailed()s, so stage C is skipped via !failure() && !cancelled().
Within-suite — inside one test job, run_suite.py (and the run_pytest helpe

sglang.title: [KDA] Support KDA packed decode
sglang.author: yuan-luo
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
KDA decode is overhead-bound at small batch. The existing flow inside KDAAttnBackend.forward_decode is:
causal_conv1d_update(mixed_qkv)
  → qkv.split([q_dim, k_dim, v_dim], dim=-1)
  → q.unflatten + q.unsqueeze
  → k.unflatten + k.unsqueeze
  → v.unflatten + v.unsqueeze
  → fused_sigmoid_

The EPD encoder server (encode_server.py) processes image preprocessing
(PIL resize + normalize via image_processor()) synchronously on the asyncio
event loop. Under N concurrent requests, all preprocessing is serialized —
each request waits for the previous one to finish. Additionally, a

This is a behavior-preserving r

Motivation
Follow up on #21599 to support adaptive speculative decoding on the NPU backend.
The adaptive speculative decoding path currently builds the target graph runner with CudaGraphRunner. This works for CUDA but does not correctly enable NPU graph execution. This PR adapts the runtime state co

sglang.title: Do not cap DeepSeek V4 PD prefill by SWA pool size

Motivation
DS v4 PD prefill is currently capped by SWA pool size because DeepSeekV4TokenToKVPool inherits from generic SWA
Following #24857 which fixes a similar problem for decode by preallocating SWA KV only for sliding-window tail, PD prefill still uses the generic SWA pool size to admit
Before c

sglang.title: [sgl] Window-aware LRU refresh for SWA prefix cache in unified cache
sglang.author: bixue2010
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Summary
Make the SWA (Sliding Window Attention) radix-cache LRU window-aware so that out-of-window SWA nodes can be evicted as they should be. This significantly improves SWA prefix-cache hit rate on long multi-turn workloads, with no behavior change for non-SWA components.

The ra

When using sglang.bench_serving --profile to collect profiling data on NPU, operator shape information is still missing even if the SGLANG_PROFILE_RECORD_SHAPES environment variable is set. This PR fixes the issue and also collects operator statistics along with other profiling informati

In MambaAttnBackendBase._track_mamba_state_extend, the gate if forward_metadata.has_mamba_track_mask: (added in #20522 to eliminate a hot-path D2H sync) rea

Motivation
When --dit-layerwise-offload is enabled (or _adjust_offload auto-sets dit_cpu_offload=True on low-VRAM cards), ServerArgs silently force-disables dit_cpu_offload. This breaks server startup on cards that cannot fit the

sglang.title: Refactor NIXL hicache. Add O_DIRECT support
sglang.author: lluki
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This is a rewrite of the HiCache NIXL connector. It fixes a number of bugs (thread synchronization, object store). It also adds an option of using O_DIRECT for file handles, which can improve I/O perfomance significantly (see below).
Modifications

Improvement: Register host memory on ini

sglang.title: Split SWA leaf to one window on insert
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
SWA only attends to the last sliding_window_size tokens, but when we lock a cached leaf to keep it from being evicted we pin the SWA slots for the whole leaf. With chunked prefill a single leaf can be thousands of tokens long, so one locked request can hold far more SWA pool than it actua

use Pillow for PNG image output saving with a faster default compression level
keep non-PNG image saving on the existing imageio path
add a pixel-preservation unit test for PNG output, including default and explicit compression settings

Why
For PNG image responses, the server currently spe

sglang.title: [RL+VLM] Avoid retokenization drift for pre-tokenized (token-id) VLM requests
sglang.author: ByronHsu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
TL;DR
For RL, we want token-in, token-out on both the inference and training sides so the two see the exact same token ids. Today the VLM path breaks this: when a request comes in as input_ids, the server decodes them back to a string and then re-tokenizes that string. Decode → re-tokenize is not gu

sglang.title: feat: optional caller-supplied mm_hashes on GenerateReqInput
sglang.author: krishung5
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
External KV routers compute per-image hashes upstream and need sglang's
MultimodalDataItem.hash to align byte-for-byte so that:
pad_value = MM_PAD_SHIFT_VALUE + (item.hash % 2^30)

is deterministic from the caller's hash. With this, two requests
carrying the same image get the same image-

sglang.title: Fix kill_process_tree reap wait crashing on pidfd EINVAL
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt: psutil.wait_procs uses os.pidfd_open for non-child processes, which can raise OSError(EINVAL) against a just-SIGKILLed/exiting process on some kernels, aborting the reap wait and failing tearDownClass even when the test passed. Poll is_running()/status() instead (reads /proc, treats zombies as gone)

sglang.title: feat: SM120 (Blackwell Desktop) support for DeepSeek-V4 inference
sglang.author: AliceChenyy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Adds full SM120 (RTX PRO 6000 / RTX 5090 / DGX Spark, compute 12.0) support for DeepSeek-V4/V3 on SGLang. SM120 desktop Blackwell GPUs lack TMEM, tcgen05, and DeepGEMM support — this PR provides Triton-based fallback kernels for all critical paths and enables CUDA graph capture.

parent_list      = [-1, 0, 1, ..., num_draft-2]   (chain pa

Motivation
Frozen-KV MTP ran a one-token eager assistant "seed" forward before the
captured recurrent draft loop. Seed and recurrent iters share the same
seq_lens - 1 rope position against frozen target KV, so splitting them
just costs an extra launch + sync per decode.

SGLANG_USE_AITER_MOE_GU_ITLV=False python3 -m sglang.launch_server \

sglang.title: [AMD] dpsk-v4 swa loc cache support
sglang.author: 1am9trash
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

DeepSeek V4 decode repeatedly translated the same full KV locations to SWA locations in every layer. This translation launched two small kernels (aten::index + aten::copy_) and cost roughly 8us per layer.
The translated SWA locations are layer-invariant within a decode step, so recomputi

Hi from novita.ai team 👋

vllm.title: [Kernel][DSv4] Optimize sparse FP8 compressor kernels
vllm.author: zyongye
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

optimize the DeepSeek V4 CuteDSL C4A FlashMLA sparse FP8-with-scale packed KV compressor layout
optimize the C128A split sparse compressor by matching the 128-row tile with fewer warps and shorter final reductions
keep the change scoped to the legacy FlashMLA packed FP8 + UE8M0 scale + BF16

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] Fix and stabilize EAGLE3 acceptance tests
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This updates the EAGLE3 acceptance length regression test to use ROCm backend auto-selection instead of hard-selecting attention backends. It adds ROCm-specific expected per-position acceptance values for gpt-oss without widening the default tolerance. The Qwen3-VL FP8 MoE case is limited to ROCm TP

vllm.title: [Rust Frontend] Support streaming `generate` endpoint
vllm.author: Xunzhuo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This enables streaming responses for the Rust frontend /inference/v1/generate endpoint.
Highlights:

Accepts stream=true instead of rejecting it.
Emits SSE data: chunks for raw generate token deltas and a final [DONE] sentinel.
Supports stream_options.include_usage with a final empty-choices usage c

vllm.title: [Frontend][Core] Add sparse NCCL weight transfer support for in-place updates
vllm.author: bedeks
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Implements an MVP sparse NCCL weight transfer path for online RL weight sync. Instead of resending full dense tensors, the trainer can send (indices, values) patches that are applied in-place to existing runtime GPU parameters.
This addresses #39451.
Current scope:

NCCL backend only
sparse

vllm.title: [Test][BugFix] Fix double-BOS in PD+specdec acceptance test
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Baseline acceptance was measured using correct llama system prompt, but the test uses raw prompt with /completions API which results in an extra prepended BOS token. This in turn causes lower acceptance rates than it should.
The test was still passing in most cases because the lower acceptance rate

The root cause is that audio_feature_lens from the HF processor is a list of 1D tensors (one per audio, each co

vllm.title: [BugFix][kv_offload]: Prevent offloading stale sliding window blocks
vllm.author: orozery
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes an edge case in sliding window offloading, where a sliding window block is not immediately offloaded (e.g. when CPU allocation fails). In this case, the block can be freed (by remove_skipped_blocks) and re-allocated to a different logical block.
Previsouly, this went undetected, which

vllm.title: [Model Runner V2] Support zeroing freshly allocated KV blocks for hybrid + fp8 KVCache

Purpose
The V2 GPU model runner never zeroed freshly allocated KV cache blocks, unlike the V1 runner. For hybrid gdn+attention models (e.g. Qwen3.5), if use flashinfer(trtllm) attn + fp8 KV cache, FlashInfer quantizes the query and dispatches to the TRTLLM attention kernel, which reads the whole KV

vllm.title: [Model Runner V2] Use actual batch max_seq_len for attn metadata
vllm.author: izhuhaoran
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
PR #40654 introduced using the actual batch max_seq_len (instead of max_model_len) for attention metadata in DefaultModelState. This is a follow-up that applies the same handling to the two V2 paths it missed: MambaHybridModelState.prepare_attn and the eagle/MTP draft _build_draft_attn_metad
